name: Flowgenix
displayName: Flowgenix - flow diagrams, documentation and unit test generation
description: One-click CodeLens to build Cursor prompts for Jest tests, Markdown docs, and Mermaid diagrams.

commands.title: NestJS Generator: Generate Tests + Docs + Diagram
NestJS Generator: Save artifacts from chat response

nestjs-generator.maxSourceCharacters.markdownDescription: Max characters of source **embedded in the prompt** (centered on the handler / method). Extraction still uses the full file. `0` = no limit.

nestjs-generator.promptDelivery.markdownDescription: **`openChat`** (default): copy prompt, run `chatFocusCommands`, wait, run paste command, then optional `chatSubmitCommand` — best-effort Cursor/VS Code AI chat. **`clipboard`**: copy only. **`languageModel`**: call `vscode.lm` and open the reply in a new Markdown editor (works when a host registers models, e.g. some VS Code setups; often empty in Cursor).

nestjs-generator.chatFocusCommands.markdownDescription: Command IDs run **in order** to open or focus AI chat before pasting. Adjust if your Cursor build uses different IDs (check Keyboard Shortcuts → right-click command → Copy Command ID).

nestjs-generator.chatPasteDelayMs.markdownDescription: Wait (ms) after focus commands before paste.

nestjs-generator.chatSubmitDelayMs.markdownDescription: Wait (ms) after paste before optional submit command.

nestjs-generator.chatPasteCommand.markdownDescription: Command to paste clipboard (must target the focused chat input when chat has focus).

nestjs-generator.chatSubmitCommand.markdownDescription: Optional command to submit the chat message (e.g. try `workbench.action.chat.stopListeningAndSubmit` if available). Leave empty to submit manually with Enter.

nestjs-generator.artifactsDocsDir.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative directory for generated Markdown docs (per handler: `{Class}.{method}.md`).

nestjs-generator.artifactsFlowDir.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative directory for generated flow Markdown files (Mermaid inside; `{Class}.{method}.md`).
